title: lomatium alpinum
intro: Lomatium alpinum, also known as alpine lomatium or Lewis' lewisia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family. It is native to the western United States and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's roots and seeds have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including colds, flu, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as immune system support and antimicrobial properties. Lomatium alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
